name: 110 West
description: Come play pickleball at 110 West in Saint James, MO! There are 3 indoor concrete and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include lights and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Chymiak Family Foundation Pickleball Complex in Green Acres Park
description: Come play pickleball at Chymiak Family Foundation Pickleball Complex in Green Acres Park in Rolla, MO! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

name: Chymiak Family Foundation Pickleball Courts
description: Chymiak Family Foundation Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rolla, MO. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility is wheelchair accessible. Reservations are not available.

name: First United Methodist Church
description: First United Methodist Church is a place to play pickleball in Rolla, MO. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Immanuel Lutheran Church
description: Immanuel Lutheran Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rolla, MO. There is 1 indoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The court is private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: St. James Community Recreation Center
description: St. James Community Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in St. James, MO. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are private.

name: St James Park Courts
description: St James Park Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Saint James, MO. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: The Centre - Rolla's Health & Recreation Complex
description: The Centre - Rolla's Health & Recreation Complex is a place to play pickleball in Rolla, MO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.
